IncorrectDecapsulationKeyLength.description: The decapsulation key has incorrect length.

tests.comment: Ciphertext too short (1567 bytes instead of 1568)
Ciphertext too long (1569 bytes instead of 1568)
Decapsulation key too short (3167 bytes instead of 3168)
Decapsulation key too long (3169 bytes instead of 3168)
Decapsulation key with corrupted embedded encapsulation key
Decapsulation key with last byte of c1 zeroed that makes decapsulation succeed on faulty c1 re-encryption comparison
Decapsulation key with last byte of c2 zeroed that makes decapsulation succeed on faulty c2 re-encryption comparison
